steps.title: Identify what needs to be converted
steps.content: The car travels 1,950 miles using 39 gallons of gasoline. The question asks how many kilometers it travels using the same 39 gallons. We need to convert 1,950 miles to kilometers.

steps.title: Apply the unit conversion factor
steps.content: Multiply by the conversion factor 1 mile = 1.6 kilometers: $$1,950 \text{ miles} \times 1.6 \frac{\text{km}}{\text{mile}} = 3,120 \text{ km}$$ That matches choice B — B is correct.
